questionHtml: The yeast Saccharomyces cerevisiae was the first eukaryotic organism to have its entire genome sequenced. Suggest reasons for the choice of yeast as a study organism.
markschemeHtml:
a. easy to grow

    OR

    easy/cheap to produce large amounts

    OR

    fast generation time

b. genomes are small/easy to manipulate

c. metabolically diverse

d. industrial applications/biopharming

e. no ethical issues «with yeast»

[Max 3 Marks]

meta.title: The yeast Saccharomyces cerevisiae was the first eukaryotic organism to have its entire genome sequenced. Suggest reasons for the choice of yeast as a study organism.
